Agent.Name: UnraidDeck

Variable.Help: Enter your App Token from the Unraid Deck iOS App Settings.
Specify the fields which are included in the title.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash # Shebang MUST be the absolute first line with NO leading spaces ############ {0} ############
# Ensure token is provided if [ -z "$DECK_TOKEN" ]; then logger -t "UnraidDeck" "Error: DECK_TOKEN is not defined in Notification Settings." exit 1 fi
# API Endpoint PUSHURL="https://unraid-push.mccray.app/webhook/$DECK_TOKEN"
# Use printf to handle potential special characters in variables safely E_TITLE=$(printf '%b' "$DECK_TITLE") E_MESSAGE=$(printf '%b' "$DECK_MESSAGE")
# Construct JSON payload matching the WebhookPayload schema # Escaping logic for JSON safety (Zero dependencies, pure Bash) ESC_TITLE=$(echo -n "$E_TITLE" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g; s/"/\\"/g; s/\n/\\n/g; s/\r/\\r/g; s/\t/\\t/g') ESC_MESSAGE=$(echo -n "$E_MESSAGE" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g; s/"/\\"/g; s/\n/\\n/g; s/\r/\\r/g; s/\t/\\t/g')
JSON_PAYLOAD=$(printf '{"subject": "%s", "description": "%s", "importance": "%s"}' \ "$ESC_TITLE" "$ESC_MESSAGE" "$IMPORTANCE")
# Send push notification with 10s timeout, piping output to /dev/null curl -s -m 10 -X POST "$PUSHURL" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8" \ -d "$JSON_PAYLOAD" > /dev/null 2>&1
